philosophies.label: Move fast
philosophies.operational_truth: Fast orgs often discover that coordination slows down after shipping speeds increase.
philosophies.user_facing_hook: We want to move faster and ship daily with AI.

philosophies.label: Empower teams
philosophies.operational_truth: Empowered teams often lose autonomy during escalations.
philosophies.user_facing_hook: We want empowered teams that own decisions.

philosophies.label: AI-first org
philosophies.tagline: AI is the default operating model
philosophies.operational_truth: AI-first mandates often create shadow workflows before adoption catches up.
philosophies.user_facing_hook: We want to become an AI-first organization.

philosophies.label: Founder mode
philosophies.emotional_subtitle: Ownership should stay close to the founder.
philosophies.operational_truth: Founder intensity often centralizes decisions just when teams need room.
philosophies.user_facing_hook: We want founder mode — direct ownership and speed.

philosophies.label: High experimentation
philosophies.operational_truth: Experimentation cultures often optimize for volume before learning compounds.
philosophies.user_facing_hook: We want faster experimentation and more tests.

philosophies.label: AI-native PMs
philosophies.operational_truth: Builder PMs often become the bottleneck when everyone waits on one prototype.
philosophies.user_facing_hook: We want AI-native PMs who ship prototypes and tools.

philosophies.label: Design-led
philosophies.operational_truth: Design-led teams often ship cohesion at the cost of iteration cycles.
philosophies.user_facing_hook: We want design-led product with unified experience.

philosophies.label: Minimal process
philosophies.operational_truth: Light process often leaves ambiguity where alignment used to live.
philosophies.user_facing_hook: We want minimal process — goals and principles, not heavy PRDs.

philosophies.label: Product-led growth
philosophies.operational_truth: PLG motions often stall when activation doesn't match the viral loop.
philosophies.user_facing_hook: We want to be product-led — self-serve growth, not sales-led.

philosophies.label: Influence without politics
philosophies.operational_truth: Alignment without politics often breaks under executive pressure.
philosophies.user_facing_hook: We want leaders to drive alignment and buy-in without politics.

philosophies.label: High performance
philosophies.operational_truth: High-performance cultures often trade psychological safety for short-term wins.
philosophies.user_facing_hook: We want a high-performance, winning culture at the company.

philosophies.label: Lean constraints
philosophies.operational_truth: Constraint-driven orgs often under-invest in the work that would unlock the next constraint.
philosophies.user_facing_hook: We want to stay lean — constraints and focus beat adding headcount.

philosophies.label: Bottom-up AI
philosophies.operational_truth: Bottom-up AI discovery often loses to top-down urgency in planning cycles.
philosophies.user_facing_hook: We want bottom-up AI adoption — teams discover what works, not top-down mandates.

philosophies.label: Evals-first AI
philosophies.operational_truth: Evals-first teams often ship slower while competitors ship and learn in production.
philosophies.user_facing_hook: We want rigorous evals and quality bars before shipping AI features.

philosophies.label: Platform org
philosophies.operational_truth: Platform orgs often become bottlenecks when every team needs the same scarce team.
philosophies.user_facing_hook: We want a platform org — shared systems, not GM silos and fiefdoms.
